title: Angelic humans
wikitext: []: Angelic humans             Quote Post by orcot » Sun Jan 01, 2023 4:18 am The Eva series (yes Unit 01 is a exception) are children of adam who lack a S2 core and are made in the image of men with a human soul(altough they mean lilin in the situation). How would the opposite look like? A child of lilith embued with a S2 core and made in the image of a angel? With a angelic soul. Would this look like kaworu and Rei. (or closer to unit 01) on a separate note, would this have worked on Ireul? Would a shadow men (prince of persia) Badeline (celeste) character have worked in the EVA setting? Or are the angels always better non interacting? Kaworu proofs it's not necesairy to have a silent angel
